projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.intro: Four projects — data, BI, full-stack and AI — supporting decision clarity and risk steering.

interpol.title: Interpol Data Scraper
interpol.description: Automated scraping system for public Interpol data. Extraction and structuring of wanted-person records, database storage and interactive visualisation of collected data.

carbonBalance.title: Carbon Balance
carbonBalance.description: Development of a full-stack carbon accounting application. Micro-services architecture covering scopes 1, 2 and 3. Data cleaning pipeline to standardise energy and logistics inputs.

brandsistersBi.title: Decision-support solutions — Brandsisters
brandsistersBi.description: BI solution roll-out for Zapa, Tara-Jarmon and Vanessa Bruno. Business needs gathering and translation into technical specifications. Data flow integrity oversight and strategic KPI implementation.

dustAgent.title: AI Agent — DUST
dustAgent.description: Design and deployment of a conversational AI agent on the DUST platform. Multiple data source integration, automated workflows and prompt fine-tuning for contextual answers.

kedge.degree: MS IMR — Global Risk Management Manager (from Sept. 2026)
